tool_contracts.name: search_tickets
tool_contracts.purpose: Find support tickets by id, customer, tag, or status.
tool_contracts.input_format: query object with one of id, customer, tag, or status

boundary.not_for: Reading the full ticket body or drafting a reply.

tool_contracts.name: read_ticket
tool_contracts.purpose: Read one known support ticket by id.

boundary.not_for: Searching for tickets or sending messages.

tool_contracts.name: draft_reply
tool_contracts.purpose: Draft a response from a known ticket body.

boundary.use_for: Create a draft after the ticket is read.
